response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience, directly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role as Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq demonstrates active AI agent infrastructure development and MCP framework work, directly matching the required AI agent development experience. Extensive track record with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) across enterprise and fintech domains. Primary gaps are framework-level specificity: Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned despite strong Node.js backend experience, and testing frameworks (Jest/Vitest/Playwright) are not named despite clear TDD and testing focus. These are minor concerns unlikely to reflect capability shortfalls.
strengths: Extensive full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React expertise across multiple senior roles with direct match to primary tech stack and current work in AI agent infrastructure
Demonstrated architecture and engineering rigor through multiple staff-level positions, TDD emphasis, CI/CD adoption, and contributions to developer tooling and frameworks
Proven ability to work across diverse technology landscapes and pick appropriate tools for different problems, directly aligning with role's philosophy
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned on resume despite Node.js backend experience, requiring clarification on framework-specific familiarity
Testing framework specialization (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not detailed in resume despite TDD emphasis, needing confirmation of hands-on framework experience
Very recent tenure at current role (April 2025-present) is brief, though current work directly addresses AI agent development requirement

key_factors.factor: Full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React with senior architecture skills
Active AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework development
